learnings.title: Count to 5
learnings.focus: Count a small group of objects up to five, one number for each.
lookFor: Knows the last number is how many

playgrounds.note: Add objects and count them out loud

learnings.title: Recognise 2D shapes
learnings.focus: Spot and name flat shapes by their sides and corners.
lookFor: Names a circle, square or triangle
Points to the sides and corners

playgrounds.note: Find the shape I call out

learnings.title: Compare sizes
learnings.focus: Compare two objects and say which is bigger or smaller.
lookFor: Uses words like bigger and smaller

playgrounds.note: Make objects big or small and compare them

learnings.title: Compare amounts
learnings.focus: Compare two groups and say which has more or fewer.
lookFor: Spots when groups are the same

playgrounds.note: Build two groups and compare how many

learnings.title: Make a repeating pattern
learnings.focus: Make and continue a simple repeating pattern.
lookFor: Spots a break in the pattern

playgrounds.note: Lay objects in a repeating pattern

learnings.title: Use position words
learnings.focus: Use position words to say where an object is.
lookFor: Puts an object on top or under
Says where it is using words

playgrounds.note: Move objects and say where they go
